# jgengine-world Б─■ capability index

## area-effect-field Б─■ source-following area membership with enter/refresh/leave edges, stacking, and cleanup

## area-stack-extremum Б─■ keep only the strongest or weakest overlapping area membership

- `extremumStack` (function) бЇ `import { extremumStack } from "@jgengine/core/world"`

## area-stack-independent Б─■ apply every overlapping area membership independently

- `independentStacks` (function) бЇ `import { independentStacks } from "@jgengine/core/world"`

## area-stack-unique Б─■ keep one area membership per stack key, strongest wins

- `uniqueByStackKey` (function) бЇ `import { uniqueByStackKey } from "@jgengine/core/world"`
